effects.rare: Increases Attack by 4% when MP is 50% or below.
effects.heroic: Increases Attack by 5% when MP is 50% or below.
effects.legendary: Increases Attack by 6% when MP is 50% or below.

effects.rare: Increases Critical Hit damage of Core Attacks by 6%.
effects.heroic: Increases Critical Hit damage of Core Attacks by 12%.
effects.legendary: Increases Critical Hit damage of Core Attacks by 20%.

effects.rare: Using Ultimate Skill increases Basic Skill Critical Hit Damage by 6% for 8 seconds.
effects.heroic: Using Ultimate Skill increases Basic Skill Critical Hit Damage by 12% for 8 seconds.
effects.legendary: Using Ultimate Skill increases Basic Skill Critical Hit Damage by 20% for 8 seconds.

effects.rare: At 30% HP or fewer, recover 10% Max HP (Cooldown: 60s).
effects.heroic: At 30% HP or fewer, recover 15% Max HP (Cooldown: 60s).
effects.legendary: At 30% HP or fewer, recover 20% Max HP (Cooldown: 60s).

effects.rare: Basic Skill grants Shield equal to 6% of Attack for 10s (Cooldown: 45s).
effects.heroic: Basic Skill grants Shield equal to 8% of Attack for 10s (Cooldown: 45s).
effects.legendary: Basic Skill grants Shield equal to 10% of Attack for 10s (Cooldown: 45s).

effects.rare: Increases Defense by 4% when MP is 50% or below.
effects.heroic: Increases Defense by 5% when MP is 50% or below.
effects.legendary: Increases Defense by 6% when MP is 50% or below.

effects.rare: Increases Defense by 4% at 70% or fewer HP.
effects.heroic: Increases Defense by 5% at 70% or fewer HP.
effects.legendary: Increases Defense by 6% at 70% or fewer HP.

effects.rare: Using Ultimate Skill grants Shield equal to 3% Max HP for 8s.
effects.heroic: Using Ultimate Skill grants Shield equal to 6% Max HP for 8s.
effects.legendary: Using Ultimate Skill grants Shield equal to 10% Max HP for 8s.

effects.rare: When hit, damage reduction increases by 3% for 10s (Cooldown: 25s).
effects.heroic: When hit, damage reduction increases by 6% for 10s (Cooldown: 25s).
effects.legendary: When hit, damage reduction increases by 10% for 10s (Cooldown: 25s).

effects.rare: At 20% MP or less, recover 20% Max MP (once per combat).
effects.heroic: At 20% MP or less, recover 25% Max MP (once per combat).
effects.legendary: At 20% MP or less, recover 30% Max MP (once per combat).

effects.rare: Decreases MP Recovery Rate by 10% and Basic Skill MP Consumption by 6%.
effects.heroic: Decreases MP Recovery Rate by 10% and Basic Skill MP Consumption by 9%.
effects.legendary: Decreases MP Recovery Rate by 10% and Basic Skill MP Consumption by 12%.

effects.rare: Using Ultimate Skill recovers 2% Max MP (Cooldown: 20s).
effects.heroic: Using Ultimate Skill recovers 3% Max MP (Cooldown: 20s).
effects.legendary: Using Ultimate Skill recovers 5% Max MP (Cooldown: 20s).

effects.rare: After Basic Attack hits 3 times, restores 1% Power Gauge (Cooldown: 10s).
effects.heroic: After Basic Attack hits 3 times, restores 2% Power Gauge (Cooldown: 10s).
effects.legendary: After Basic Attack hits 3 times, restores 3% Power Gauge (Cooldown: 10s).
